+        # Resize to fixed small res for stability and to avoid patch count errors

+        max_dim = 448

+        if max(image.size) > max_dim:

+            if image.width > image.height:

+                new_w = max_dim

+                new_h = int(max_dim * image.height / image.width)

+            else:

+                new_h = max_dim

+                new_w = int(max_dim * image.width / image.height)

+            image = image.resize((new_w, new_h), Image.BILINEAR)
